acceptance_evidence.health: pass: liveness is distinct from readiness; required failure closes readiness; optional failure degrades; thrown and timed-out checks expose only stable codes
acceptance_evidence.telemetry_failure: pass: validated logging, metric, and trace sink failures do not fail application work
